race.comment: TWILIGHT STEPS (7) looks ready to win after a much-improved effort when third over 1600m at the Sunshine Coast Poly last time, finishing just 1.5 lengths from the winner. The claim helps and he appears well placed to go close. CONEY ISLAND BABY (1) arrives off a solid second at Toowoomba over a similar trip and now has his first start for the Brooke Mackie stable. From a good draw he should get every chance. GOLD DAZZLER (11) has had a few runs this preparation and should be nearing peak fitness. He looks capable of picking up some minor money in what appears a suitable assignment.
